mapper.select: SELECT r.*, p.id as permission_id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, p.description FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE r.id = #{roleId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT r.*, m.id as menu_id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.sort FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON r.id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE r.id = #{roleId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND m.deleted = 0
SELECT r.* FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.id = u.role_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND u.deleted = 0
